contents:
(** * Indexed sum of categories *)

(** We define a wild category structure on [sig B] where [B : A -> Type] is a family of wild categories.  In this construction, we implicitly regard [A] as a wild category using its path groupoid structure.  We only handle the case where each [B a] is a 0-groupoid, for now. *)
exact {p : x = y & p # u $-> v}.

goals.conclusion: forall a : {x : _ & B x}, a $-> a
forall a b c : {x : _ & B x}, (b $-> c) -> (a $-> b) -> a $-> c
forall a : {x : _ & B x}, a $-> a
forall a b c : {x : _ & B x}, (b $-> c) -> (a $-> b) -> a $-> c

contents: intros [x u] [y v] [z w] [q g] [p f].

goals.conclusion: forall a b : {x : _ & B x}, (a $-> b) -> b $-> a
Is0Functor (fun x : {x : _ & B x} => (x.1; F x.1 x.2))

hypotheses.type: forall a : A, B a -> C a

goals.conclusion: Is0Functor (fun x : {x : _ & B x} => (x.1; F x.1 x.2))

hypotheses.type: forall a : A, B a -> C a

contents: constructor; intros [a1 b1] [a2 b2] [p f]; cbn.

goals.conclusion: {p0 : a1 = a2 & transport C p0 (F a1 b1) $-> F a2 b2}

hypotheses.type: forall a : A, B a -> C a

goals.conclusion: transport C p (F a1 b1) $-> F a2 b2

hypotheses.type: forall a : A, B a -> C a

goals.conclusion: F a1 b1 $-> F a1 b2

hypotheses.type: forall a : A, B a -> C a
